curation_notes: Patch commit 0f23897 (PR #3440) modifies Shell.java to add an authenticateUser() call after creating the AccumuloClient in the config() method. In the pre-patch code, the shell creates a client with the provided credentials but never verifies them against the server, so invalid credentials are silently accepted. ShellOptionsJC.java changes are cosmetic (variable rename, visibility change). The pre-assigned class auth-bypass from CWE-287 is correct — the vulnerability is a missing authentication check during shell session initialization.
